cf_parsed.subtask_body: I have conducted a thorough search for improvements to the 350.52 tour. I tested alternative connections for city 19, which is somewhat isolated, but found that its current placement as a bridge between the Mid-Right cluster (7, 3, 12, 10, 11) and the Bottom-Left cluster (13, 0, 18, 1) is the most efficient. I also explored re-ordering the Top-Mid and Top-Left clusters, but the current sequence [13, 0, 18, 1, 6, 17, 5, 4, 2, 9, 8, 16, 14, 15, 11, 10, 12, 3, 7, 19] consistently outperformed the alternatives. The total length remains approximately 350.52, which represents a significant improvement over the baseline of 447.892. All 20 cities are included exactly once in the closed tour.
